title: leuconymphaea ampla
intro: Leuconymphaea ampla, also known as the Horsetail plant, is a perennial species of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Equisetum. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of silicic acid, a compound that has been used to treat a variety of health issues. The Horsetail plant has been used to treat kidney problems, urinary tract infections, and to improve bone health due to its high silica content, which can help to strengthen bones and connective tissue. Horsetail plant is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in some traditional medicine preparations to treat a range of health conditions.
